name: Cafe Aquatica
tagline: Organic coffee and ocean views where the river meets the sea
seoDescription: Cafe Aquatica is a coastal cafe in Jenner where the Russian River meets the Pacific: locally roasted organic coffee, fresh sustainable fare, and live music

sections.heading: Where the River Meets the Sea
sections.subheading: Locally roasted organic coffee, fresh coastal fare, and live music on the Jenner estuary every weekend.
badges: Where the river meets the sea

items.title: Locally Roasted Coffee
items.description: Outstanding cappuccinos, mochas, and espresso from locally roasted beans.

items.title: Coastal Cafe Fare
items.description: Fresh, sustainably sourced breakfast and lunch: poached eggs, smoked-lox bagels, clam chowder.

items.title: Weekend Live Music
items.description: Live musicians on the deck every Saturday and Sunday, overlooking the estuary.

items.title: Estuary & Ocean Views
items.description: Deck and patio seating with sweeping views where the river meets the sea.

sections.heading: About Cafe Aquatica
body: Cafe Aquatica is a coastal bungalow perched on the shore in Jenner, right where the Russian River meets the Pacific. Under owner Rachel Kulinski, it pours locally roasted organic coffee and serves fresh, sustainably sourced food with some of the best estuary and ocean views on the Sonoma Coast.

Famed for its cappuccinos, mochas, clam chowder, and house-smoked lox, it is a laid-back beach cafe where fine musicians share their art on the deck every Saturday and Sunday, a local favorite and a coast-road landmark.
highlights: Where the river meets the sea
